pin_run_as_build:

python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython

build:
  number: 1
  noarch: generic
  script: build.py

requirements:
  build:
    - rpm-tools
    - python

tests:
  - script:
      interpreter: python
      content: |
        import os
        os.environ["X509_VOMS_DIR"]
        os.environ["VOMS_USERCONF"]

  - package_contents:
      strict: true
      files:
        # -- Env Vars --
        - etc/conda/env_vars.d/voms-lsc.json
        # -- desy-voms-all --
        - etc/grid-security/vomsdir/belle/grid-voms.desy.de.lsc
        - etc/grid-security/vomsdir/calice/grid-voms.desy.de.lsc

        - etc/grid-security/vomsdir/ildg/grid-voms.desy.de.lsc
        - etc/grid-security/vomsdir/olympus/grid-voms.desy.de.lsc
